name: io.github.tsilva/mcp-openrouter
title: OpenRouter
description: MCP server providing access to 300+ AI models via OpenRouter

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key used to authenticate tool requests.

environmentVariables.name: DEFAULT_TEXT_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Default model slug for chat tool calls when no model is provided.

environmentVariables.name: DEFAULT_IMAGE_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Default model slug for image generation tool calls.

environmentVariables.name: DEFAULT_CODE_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Default model slug for code-oriented tasks.

environmentVariables.name: DEFAULT_VISION_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Default model slug for vision-capable tool calls.

environmentVariables.name: DEFAULT_EMBEDDING_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Default model slug for embedding tool calls when no model is provided.
